changelog: PERFECT-FIT CARDS: Game and PPV cards rewritten with a strict three-zone Column layout (top status row → flexible scores/title middle → bottom accent line / channel chip). Column stacking means zones cannot overlap by construction — no more clipped scores, no more pill-collisions, regardless of font scale or TV overscan.
Card height bumped 200dp → 220dp giving the scores row 50% more breathing room.
Live-game scoreboard now uses 36sp scores (up from 26sp) and 52dp team badges (up from 36dp) — readable from across the room.
Upcoming-game layout simplified to a single horizontal row: [badge] AWAY · VS · HOME [badge]. No more vertical badge-over-name stack that could push content off the bottom.
